plugins.name: secure-baseline
plugins.description: Cross-cutting baseline — secure-coding instructions, docs style guide, security reviewer persona. Every Zava service pins this.

plugins.name: ideate-kit
plugins.description: IDEATE stage — meeting-to-issue skill (transcript / voice / ticket → well-formed GitHub issue).

plugins.name: code-kit
plugins.description: CODE stage — architect persona for design-intent guidance during local authoring.

plugins.name: review-kit
plugins.description: REVIEW stage — pre-PR self-review skills. Multi-perspective panel review (architect + security) of staged changes, run by the author before push.

plugins.name: release-kit
plugins.description: RELEASE stage — CI/CD golden paths instructions (reusable workflows, deploy gates, environment promotion).

plugins.name: operate-kit
plugins.description: OPERATE stage — incident-to-PR skill (Azure SRE Agent finding → scoped remediation pull request).
